job_title: Data Engineer II , NA Stores Expansion
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Engineering, Data Engineer
core_skills: Data Modeling, Data Warehousing, ETL Pipelines, AWS Services, AWS Redshift
skill_match_scores: Data Modeling:1.0, Data Warehousing:0.0, ETL Pipelines:1.0, AWS Services:1.0, AWS Redshift:0.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years of data engineering experience, Bachelor's degree, Experience with data modeling, warehousing and building ETL pipelines, Good leadership skills, Proven ability to develop, enhance, automate, and manage analytics models and data pipelines, Strong data mining and modeling skills, Ability to facilitate idea creation and work from concept through to execution, Ability to present findings to cross functional team partners, Proven ability to work with Applied Scientists, Data Scientists, Software Development Engineers, Product Managers and Business Partners, Comfortable using intellect, curiosity and technical ability to develop innovative solutions to business problems
preferred_quals: Experience with AWS technologies like Redshift, S3, AWS Glue, EMR, Kinesis, FireHose, Lambda, and IAM roles and permissions, Experience with non-relational databases / data stores (object storage, document or key-value stores, graph databases, column-family databases), Usage of generative AI tools to enhance workflow efficiency, with a willingness to learn effective prompting and evaluation practices, Ability to recognize opportunities where generative AI could enhance products, workflows, or customer experiences
core_responsibilities: Design, develop and maintain scalable data models, ETL/ELT processes, and ML pipelines using AWS services (S3, Redshift, Glue, Athena, Lake Formation), Analyze business data to optimize key processes in Retail and Supply Chain domains, Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Scientists, Engineers, Program Managers) to deliver data solutions and implement predictive models, Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines while ensuring data governance, security, and compliance standards, Monitor, optimize, and enhance data infrastructure to support analytics and machine learning, Stay current with emerging technologies and mentor junior engineers in data engineering and MLOps best practices
job_summary: Amazon is seeking an experienced and motivated Data Engineer to work on strategic projects across multiple geographies. The role involves designing, developing, and maintaining scalable data models and ETL/ELT processes while collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver data solutions and implement predictive models.
